title: alsine baicalensis
intro: Alsine baicalensis, also known as Baikal saxifrage, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the saxifrage family. Traditionally, Alsine baicalensis has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Alsine baicalensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions.
